name: Functional - Summarize Meeting File Upload Success
description: Ensures /summarize_file endpoint processes a valid .txt file and returns a summary.
input: POST /summarize_file with a valid .txt UploadFile, summary_length='paragraph', and valid user_email.
output: FileUploadResponse with success=True, summary and structured_summary populated, error=None.
error_scenarios: FileExtractionError if file is empty or unsupported
